claim_text: FY2024 revenue for BYD Company Limited was 777.1 billion yuan, representing a 29.02% year-on-year increase.
span_text: 本集团营业额约人民币 777,102 百万元，同比上升 29.02%。

claim_text: FY2024 net profit attributable to shareholders for BYD Company Limited was 40.25 billion yuan, a 34.00% year-on-year increase.
span_text: 母公司拥有人应占溢利约为人民币 40,254 百万元，同比上升 34.00%。

claim_text: FY2024 R&D investment for BYD Company Limited was approximately 54.2 billion yuan, an increase of 35.68% year-on-year.
span_text: 二零二四年我们的研发投入约为 542 亿元，同比上升 35.68%。

claim_text: FY2024 new energy vehicle sales for BYD Company Limited grew by over 40% year-on-year.
span_text: 二零二四年，我们的新能源汽车销量继续保持强劲增长，同比增长超 40%。

claim_text: In FY2024, BYD Company Limited achieved a market share of 33.2% in the Chinese new energy vehicle market.
span_text: 二零二四年本集团新能源汽车销量在高基数的基础上同比增长超 40%，市占率进一步提升至 33.2%。

claim_text: BYD Company Limited became the first automaker globally to roll off its 10 millionth new energy vehicle in November 2024.
span_text: 十一月更成为全球首家达成第 1,000 万辆新能源汽车下线里程碑的车企。

claim_text: In May 2024, BYD launched its 5th Generation DM technology, achieving a global mass-production engine thermal efficiency of 46.06% and a fuel consumption of 2.9L/100km.
span_text: 五月，我们亦推出“第五代 DM 技术”，实现全球量产最高发动机热效率 46.06%、全球最低百公里亏电油耗 2.9L。

claim_text: BYD Company Limited launched its 'Whole Vehicle Intelligence' strategy in early 2024, integrating electrification and intelligence via the 'Xuanji' architecture.
span_text: 年初，我们发布智能化全新战略“整车智能”，实现了电动化与智能化的高效融合。

claim_text: BYD Company Limited's new energy vehicles have entered over 100 countries and regions across 6 continents as of the end of 2024.
span_text: 截至二零二四年年底，我们的新能源汽车已进入全球 6 大洲、100 多个国家和地区。

claim_text: BYD Company Limited's overseas revenue in FY2024 was 221.9 billion yuan, a 38.49% year-on-year increase.

BYD Company Limited operates factories in Uzbekistan and Thailand, with the Uzbekistan factory producing its first mass-produced NEVs in June 2024 and the Thailand factory commencing production in July 2024.
span_text: 六月，本集团乌兹别克斯坦工厂首批量产新能源车型正式下线；七月，本集团泰国工厂正式竣工投产。

claim_text: In FY2024, BYD Company Limited's R&D personnel count reached 121,598, an 18.24% increase from the previous year.
BYD Company Limited's 'Tian Shen Zhi Yan' (God's Eye) advanced intelligent driving system launched mapless city navigation functionality nationwide in 2024.
span_text: 高阶智能驾驶辅助系统“天神之眼”亦于年内在全国范围内正式开通无图城市领航功能。

claim_text: BYD Company Limited's FY2024 cash reserves were approximately 154.9 billion yuan.
span_text: 截至二零二四年十二月三十一日，我们的现金储备约为 154,937 百万元。

claim_text: In FY2024, BYD Company Limited's operating cash flow net amount decreased by 21.37% year-on-year to 133.5 billion yuan, primarily due to increased cash payments for goods and services.
span_text: 经营活动产生的现金流量净额 133,453,873,000.00 169,725,025,000.00 -21.37% 主要是购买商品、接受劳务支付的现金增加所致

claim_text: BYD Company Limited acknowledges that the global economy faces slow recovery, rising protectionism, and uncertainty in international trade, which poses challenges to the industry.
span_text: 二零二四年，全球经济呈现缓慢复苏态势，但保护主义上升给国际贸易增添诸多不确定性。

claim_text: BYD Company Limited states that domestic effective demand is insufficient and the transition between old and new drivers brings challenges to various industries.
span_text: 国内有效需求不足，新旧动能转换给各行各业的发展带来一定挑战。

claim_text: BYD Company Limited's FY2024 H1 revenue was 301.1 billion yuan, a 15.76% year-on-year increase.
In H1 2024, BYD Company Limited's net profit attributable to shareholders was 13.63 billion yuan, a 24.44% year-on-year increase.
In H1 2024, BYD Company Limited's operating cash flow net amount decreased by 82.70% year-on-year to 14.18 billion yuan, primarily due to increased cash payments for goods and services.
BYD Company Limited identifies raw material price volatility (steel, lithium, copper) as a risk that could directly impact production costs and operating performance.
span_text: 集团生产所需主要原材料包括钢材、塑胶及其他金属原材料，如锂、铜等，原材料价格的波动会直接影响集团主营业务的生产成本，进而对集团的经营业绩产生一定影响。

claim_text: BYD Company Limited acknowledges that if it cannot maintain or improve product competitiveness in the future, it faces the risk of being in an unfavorable position in market competition.
span_text: 如果未来集团不能继续保持或提升产品竞争力，集团将面临在市场竞争中处于不利地位的风险。

claim_text: In H1 2024, BYD Company Limited's new energy vehicle market share in China increased to 32.6%.
span_text: 根据中汽协数据，2024 年上半年，公司新能源汽车市占率进一步提升至 32.6%。

claim_text: BYD Company Limited rolled off its 7 millionth new energy vehicle in March 2024, becoming the first Chinese automaker to achieve this milestone.
span_text: 2024 年 3 月，公司第 700 万辆新能源汽车下线，成为首家达成这一成绩的中国车企。

claim_text: BYD Company Limited's 2024 R&D expenditure of 54.2 billion yuan exceeded its net profit for the year.
source_title: BYD reports its financial results in 2024: revenue hits 777.1 billion yuan, up 23% year on year
span_text: BYD's R&D expenditure reached 54.2 billion yuan in 2024, an increase of 36% year on year and far in excess of its net profit.

span_text: four distinct advantages of the Blade Battery including a high starting temperature for exothermic reactions, slow heat release and low heat generation, as well as its ability to not release oxygen during breakdowns
